# Chase Sapphire Preferred vs Capital One Venture X

## 💰 Fees

| | Sapphire Preferred | Venture X |
|---|---|---|
| Annual fee | $95 | $395 |
| Foreign transaction fee | None | None |
| Authorized user fee | $0 | $0 |

## 📈 Earning Rates

| Category | Sapphire Preferred | Venture X |
|---|---|---|
| Dining | 3x | 2x |
| Travel (portal) | 5x | 10x (Capital One Travel) |
| Travel (other) | 2x | 2x |
| Streaming | 3x | — |
| Online grocery | 3x | — |
| All other | 1x | 2x |

## 🏷️ Credits

| | Sapphire Preferred | Venture X |
|---|---|---|
| Hotel credit | $50/yr via Chase Travel | — |
| Travel credit | — | $300/yr via Capital One Travel |
| Anniversary bonus | — | 10,000 miles/yr |

## 🔄 Transfer Partners

| | Sapphire Preferred | Venture X |
|---|---|---|
| Program | Ultimate Rewards | Capital One Miles |
| Partner count | 14 | 15+ |
| Ratio | Mostly 1:1 | Mostly 1:1 |

## ✈️ Key Benefits

| | Sapphire Preferred | Venture X |
|---|---|---|
| Lounge access | None | Capital One Lounges + Priority Pass |
| Rental car CDW | Primary (intl) | Primary |
| Trip insurance | Yes | Yes |

## 🏆 Bottom Line

- **Lower cost entry**: Sapphire Preferred ($95 vs $395)
- **Better dining earn**: Sapphire Preferred (3x vs 2x)
- **Better flat-rate earn**: Venture X (2x vs 1x on non-bonus)
- **Better travel perks**: Venture X (lounge access, $300 credit)
- **Net fee after credits**: Sapphire Preferred $45, Venture X $85
- **Transfer quality**: Comparable — both have strong airline/hotel partners at 1:1

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Fixture only. Not live card data.
